# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket to store application assets. Configure the bucket for public read access so our website can serve static files (images, CSS, JavaScript). Keep the template simple for quick deployment.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: S3 bucket for storing application static assets (images, CSS, JavaScript) with controlled public read access

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for static assets
    AllowedPattern: ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$
    ConstraintDescription: Bucket name must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and periods
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - production
      - staging
      - development
    Description: Deployment environment

Resources:
  AssetsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub ${BucketName}-${Environment}
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: false
        RestrictPublicBuckets: false
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerEnforced
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: CleanupOldVersions
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: 30
      CorsConfiguration:
        CorsRules:
          - AllowedHeaders:
              - '*'
            AllowedMethods:
              - GET
              - HEAD
            AllowedOrigins:
              - '*'
            MaxAge: 3600
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: StaticAssets

  AssetsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AssetsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPublicReadOnlyForStaticAssets
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub ${AssetsBucket.Arn}/public/images/*
              - !Sub ${AssetsBucket.Arn}/public/css/*
              - !Sub ${AssetsBucket.Arn}/public/js/*
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'true'
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:*
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AssetsBucket.Arn
              - !Sub ${AssetsBucket.Arn}/*
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:SecureTransport: 'false'
          - Sid: DenyUnexpectedActions
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:DeleteBucket
              - s3:DeleteBucketPolicy
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt AssetsBucket.Arn

  CloudFrontOAC:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::OriginAccessControl
    Properties:
      OriginAccessControlConfig:
        Name: !Sub ${BucketName}-${Environment}-oac
        Description: OAC for S3 static assets bucket
        OriginAccessControlOriginType: s3
        SigningBehavior: always
        SigningProtocol: sigv4

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 assets bucket
    Value: !Ref AssetsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 assets bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AssetsBucket.Arn
  BucketDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AssetsBucket.DomainName
  PublicAssetsBaseUrl:
    Description: Base URL for public static assets (HTTPS only)
    Value: !Sub https://${AssetsBucket.DomainName}/public
  CloudFrontOACId:
    Description: CloudFront Origin Access Control ID (recommended for production use instead of direct public access)
    Value: !Ref CloudFrontOAC
  SecurityNote:
    Description: Important security information
    Value: Public read access is restricted to public/images/*, public/css/*, and public/js/* prefixes only. HTTPS is enforced. Consider using CloudFront with the provided OAC for better security and performance.
